title: Character.ai Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Character.ai effectively in everyday scenarios.

commands.command: Start a conversation with a character
commands.description: Initiates a chat with a chosen character.
commands.scenario: When you want to interact with a specific character or persona.

commands.command: Ask for advice on a personal issue
commands.description: Provides personal advice based on the character's persona.
commands.scenario: When you need guidance or a second opinion on personal matters.

commands.description: Creates a unique story based on your prompts.
commands.scenario: When you need inspiration or a creative story idea.

commands.description: Simulates a role-playing scenario with the character.
commands.scenario: When practicing dialogues or exploring hypothetical situations.

commands.command: Translate a phrase into another language
commands.description: Translates text using the character's language skills.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick translation for communication.

commands.description: Breaks down complex topics into simpler terms.
commands.scenario: When you need help understanding difficult concepts.

commands.description: Provides a concise summary of a given text.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a long document.

commands.description: Generates creative ideas based on your project needs.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck and need fresh ideas for a project.

commands.command: Rewrite text in a different tone
commands.description: Changes the tone of your text to suit different audiences.
commands.scenario: When you need to adjust the tone of a message or document.

commands.command: Create a dialogue between two characters
commands.description: Simulates a conversation between two chosen characters.
commands.scenario: When exploring interactions or writing scripts.

commands.command: Get a character's opinion on a topic
commands.description: Provides an opinion based on the character's persona.
commands.scenario: When you want to explore different perspectives on a topic.

commands.command: Practice a language with a character
commands.description: Engages in conversation to practice language skills.
commands.scenario: When learning a new language and needing practice.

commands.description: Recreates a historical event with characters for learning.
commands.scenario: When studying history and wanting an interactive experience.

commands.command: Ask a character to tell a joke
commands.description: Provides a joke based on the character's style.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick laugh or icebreaker.

commands.description: Provides detailed background information on a character.
commands.scenario: When you want to learn more about a character's history.

commands.description: Use 'Out of Character' notation in parentheses to give the AI direct instructions about the story or formatting without breaking the roleplay immersion.

commands.command: Force a character's reaction with '*action description*'
commands.description: Use asterisks to describe physical actions or non-verbal cues to guide the AI into reacting to your movements rather than just your words.
If a response feels off, swipe left on the message to generate an alternative version of that specific reply instead of continuing the conversation.
Prompt the AI to play multiple distinct characters in a single chat by defining their names and traits in the initial prompt.
Start a chat by providing a 'Setting Summary' to ensure the AI maintains consistent environmental details and rules throughout the session.
